title: L3 cycle.lock_failed Payload
description: Emitted when flock acquire on .run/cycles/<schedule_id>.lock times out. Indicates an overlapping invocation is in progress; this invocation refuses to proceed (FR-L3-5). cycle-098 Sprint 3A.

cycle_id.description: Cycle id this invocation would have used (computed before lock attempt). null only if cycle_id derivation itself failed.

lock_path.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the lock file.

holder_pid.description: PID of the process currently holding the lock, when discoverable via fuser/lsof; null otherwise.
